'''Qalsneek the Bull''' was a [[Swimming People of Dellalt|Swimmer]] from [[Dellalt/Legends|Dellalt]].<ref name="CSWE" /> He was a [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] during the [[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]]. He was responsible for many of the water-culture artifacts evacuated from [[Ossus/Legends|Ossus]], following its destruction in the [[Cron Drift/Legends|Cron Drift]] [[Cron Supernova/Legends|supernova]]. He hid them beneath the seas of [[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]], in the [[Derem City]] ruins, along with his own [[Qalsneek's holocron|holocron]].<ref name="GatORW" />
